product.shippingNote: Nationwide delivery in 3-5 days. Free returns within 30 days.

journal.title: The Maison Journal
journal.intro: Stories on fabric, craft, and the people behind every piece.

about.title: Tailoring for a real life
about.lead: Maison DnA was founded on a simple belief: premium clothing shouldn't require an unreasonable price tag — just good materials, careful craft, and a transparent supply chain.
about.body1: We work directly with mills and ateliers across Vietnam, cutting out the middlemen to keep prices honest without cutting corners on quality.
about.body2: Every piece is inspected before it reaches you — because we believe a well-made garment should stay with you for years, not just a season.
about.value1Body: Organic cotton, Italian wool, natural silk — no cheap viscose blends.
about.value2Body: No middlemen, no markup for a name on a label.
about.value3Body: Reinforced seams, quality-checked before it ever leaves the atelier.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Questions about a product, an order, or a partnership? Send us a message.

booking.title: Book a showroom consultation
booking.intro: Choose a date and time that works for you — a Maison DnA stylist will help you find the right fit and pieces.
booking.confirmNote: We'll confirm your booking within 24 hours.

vip.title: Privileges made for you
vip.intro: The longer you stay with Maison DnA, the more you unlock — from birthday gifts to early access to limited collections.
vip.tierPlatinumPerk: Early access to limited collections, exclusive gifts.
vip.cta: Create an account to start earning
